statement: CoreWeave on-demand price for an NVIDIA HGX B200 instance (8 GPUs) is $68.80 per instance-hour in North America; page states per-instance pricing, not per-GPU; static level, no baseline stated.
why: Current rental price level for NVIDIA's B200 HGX class on a major neocloud; feeds the price overlay for Blackwell-generation capacity.

impact.mechanism: On-demand HGX B200 instance price level serves as a display overlay reference; no baseline stated, so no momentum inferred.

confidence.basis: Secondary open-web pricing page read on 2026-07-03; per-single-GPU basis not confirmed by the page.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: value 50.44 -> 68.8 (tol 1%); sources: CoreWeave
